# parsers.csv

**Generated by:** [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.py`](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md)
**Granularity:** One row per non-ASIM parser
**Type:** Entity table

## Overview

All non-ASIM parsers (KQL functions) found in solution `Parsers/` directories and the legacy top-level `/Parsers/*` directories. Each parser's underlying tables are extracted from its `FunctionQuery`, and filter fields are extracted to enable connector association.

## Use Cases

- **Parser inventory** — list every parser shipping with a solution or in the legacy directory.
- **Find parsers for a table** — `tables` column lists the underlying tables a parser queries.
- **Selection-criteria analysis** — `filter_fields` shows what the parser filters on (e.g., `CommonSecurityLog.DeviceVendor == "Acme"`).
- **Discovered vs declared** — `discovered == true` flags parsers found by file scan but not listed in the Solution JSON.
- **Legacy parser tracking** — `location == "legacy"` identifies pre-Solutions parsers stored as `.txt`, `.kql`, or `.yaml` files.
- **Kusto upload** — uploaded as `solution_analyzer_parsers_lookup` by `upload_to_kusto.py`.

## Columns

| Column | Description | Data Source |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| `parser_name` | Parser function name | YAML `FunctionName` or filename |
| `parser_title` | Display title | YAML `displayName` or `Title` |
| `parser_version` | Version number | YAML `version` or `Version` |
| `parser_last_updated` | Last update date | YAML `lastUpdated` or `Last Updated` |
| `parser_category` | Parser category/type | YAML `category` or `Category` |
| `description` | Parser description | YAML `description` or `Description` |
| `tables` | Semicolon-separated list of source tables used by the parser | KQL parsing of `FunctionQuery` |
| `source_file` | Relative path to the source file | File system |
| `github_url` | Full GitHub URL to the parser definition | Computed |
| `solution_name` | Solution name (empty for legacy parsers) | Parent solution folder |
| `solution_folder` | Solution folder name | Parent solution folder |
| `solution_github_url` | GitHub URL of the solution | Computed |
| `location` | `solution` (in `Solutions/`) or `legacy` (top-level `/Parsers/*`) | File path analysis |
| `file_type` | `yaml`, `kql`, or `txt` | File extension |
| `discovered` | `true` if found by file scan but not listed in Solution JSON | Comparison |
| `filter_fields` | Pipe-separated `Table.Field op "value"` clauses extracted from the parser query. Predicates on raw documented columns are attributed to the owning table; predicates on fields defined via `\| extend` use the synthetic table `_Computed`. | See [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.md` › Filter Fields Detection](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md#filter-fields-detection) |

## Related CSVs

- [`asim_parsers.csv`](asim_parsers.md) — ASIM parsers (different schema).
- [`connectors.csv`](connectors.md) — connectors that reference these parsers via `parser:{parser_name}` table detection.
- [`tables.csv`](tables.md) — underlying tables; join on `tables` (semicolon-separated).
